name: AI procurement readiness gap
description: Small AI vendors are encountering enterprise security questionnaires before they have reusable, buyer-ready answers.
who_has_the_gap: Founders currently inside enterprise procurement conversations
who_needs_the_gap_closed: Small B2B AI vendors starting enterprise pilots
why_now: Enterprise buyers are adding AI security review steps faster than small vendors can prepare credible answers.
window_risk: The gap may close as generic templates and compliance vendors package this workflow.
notes: Validate with founders before creating any reusable tool.
